name: dependency-guardian
description: Security proxy for package managers - blocks vulnerable and malicious dependencies before they reach your project.

commands.title: Dependency Guardian: Configure npm to Use Proxy
Dependency Guardian: Configure pip to Use Proxy
Dependency Guardian: Configure Go to Use Proxy
Dependency Guardian: Configure Maven to Use Proxy

enumDescriptions: Launch and manage a local guardian binary
Connect to an already-running guardian service (local or remote)
dependencyGuardian.connectionMode.description: How to connect to the Dependency Guardian proxy.

dependencyGuardian.hostedUrl.description: URL of the hosted guardian service (e.g. http://guardian.internal:8080). Only used when connectionMode is 'hosted'.

dependencyGuardian.binaryPath.description: Path to the guardian binary. Leave empty to use the bundled binary or search PATH. Only used when connectionMode is 'local'.

dependencyGuardian.listenPort.description: Port for the proxy server to listen on. Only used when connectionMode is 'local'.

dependencyGuardian.configDirectory.description: Path to the configuration directory. Leave empty to use bundled defaults. Only used when connectionMode is 'local'.

dependencyGuardian.policiesDirectory.description: Path to the OPA/Rego policies directory. Leave empty to use bundled defaults. Only used when connectionMode is 'local'.

dependencyGuardian.autoStart.description: Automatically start the proxy (local mode) or connect to the hosted service when VS Code opens.

dependencyGuardian.autoStopOnClose.description: Automatically stop the local guardian process when VS Code closes. Set to false to keep it running (e.g. for background vulnerability database syncing). Only applies when connectionMode is 'local'.

dependencyGuardian.refreshInterval.description: How often (in seconds) to poll for new decisions.
